visual_description: The man in a plaid shirt stands by a brown bag, placing items into it while a woman in a hospital bed watches him. He gestures with his hand as he speaks, and the woman raises her hand in response. Another man in a beige jacket pulls back a curtain, revealing a second woman in a bed who rests her hands behind her head.
